data.name: VdotCard_Description
data.value: Great! From your reference race we can determine your individual VDOT. This forms the basis for your personal training zones.

data.name: PaceInfo_EPace_Description
data.value: Your easy run pace. Run at this pace for recovery or easy training. It builds aerobic endurance and aids recovery.

data.name: PaceInfo_MPace_Description
data.value: Your marathon pace. Training in this zone improves your ability to maintain a steady pace over long distances.

data.name: PaceInfo_TPace_Description
data.value: Your threshold pace. Training in this zone improves your lactate threshold and helps you run faster without accumulating too much lactic acid.

data.name: PaceInfo_IPace_Description
data.value: Your interval pace. Short, intense efforts in this zone improve your maximum oxygen uptake (VO2max).

data.name: PaceInfo_RPace_Description
data.value: Your repetition pace. Very short, fast runs at this pace improve your running economy and speed.

data.name: AddRaceDialog_Warning_Message
data.value: Please check that the race time is in the correct format (hh:mm:ss).
